_comment: EchoBird-owned pinned items injected into the pulse feed by scripts/inject_pinned.py. The 'position' field is 1-indexed against the Rust-side effective_ts sort: position 3 means '3rd visible item'. Title shows in the feed as-is. URL must be canonical (echobird.ai/...).

zh.title: 白嫖 OpenRouter 免费模型:每天 50 次免费请求跑顶尖大模型(官方教程)
